summary: OTP features testing completed successfully. All 8 features tested and working correctly. Backend API tests passed (15/16, 1 rate-limited). Frontend UI tests all passed.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during OTP registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP system fully tested. Registration requires phone field. OTP codes are logged in backend (MOCKED - not sent via email). Super admin bypasses OTP verification.

Inscription: Le formulaire affiche les c.details: All registration fields present: name, phone (required), company, address, email, password. Phone validation enforces French format.

Inscription: Soumission retourne 'requir.details: Registration returns {requires_verification: true, email: '...'} and generates OTP code logged in backend

OTP: Vérification de l'email avec code O.details: /api/auth/verify-email endpoint exists and validates OTP codes. Returns tokens on success.

Page Profil: Accessible via /profil, aff.details: Profile page at /profil shows user info (name, phone, company, address, email, role, dates) with edit form

Page Utilisateurs: Fiche détaillée avec.details: User detail page shows all fields: email, phone, company, address, created_at, last_login, is_active, email_verified

Page Utilisateurs: Actions admin disponi.details: Admin actions available: Modifier le rôle, Réinitialiser le mot de passe, Activer/Désactiver le compte, Mode Support, Supprimer l'utilisateur

Page Paramètres: Section 'Site web' visi.details: Settings page has 'Site web' section with URL input and 'Demander une création de site' button when no website is set

Formulaire demande site: S'ouvre et cont.details: Website request dialog contains: Type d'activité, Objectif du site, Budget estimé, Délai souhaité, Notes additionnelles

mocked_apis_list: Resend email OTP - codes are logged in backend with format [OTP] Code: XXXXXX and stored in MongoDB otp_codes collection
